name: PharmaCielo Ltd.
summary: PharmaCielo Ltd., together with its subsidiary, cultivates, processes, produces, and supplies medicinal-grade cannabis oil extracts, tetrahydrocannabinol, and related products to pharmacies, medical clinics, and cosmetic companies. The company also offers telemedicine software. It serves in Canada, Colombia, Italy, and Mexico. PharmaCielo Ltd. has a strategic alliance with AssuredTrans Inc. PharmaCielo Ltd. is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
